symptom_description: Strong physical vibration (`0.27` in/sec RMS) felt on motor baseplate. Spectrum analysis confirms pure once-per-revolution (`1X`) imbalance frequency.
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.07 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.009 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.71` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.55` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`186 Amps`).
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`3.0 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.66` in/sec) over `25560` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`2.0 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`Spec-375`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.25` in/sec RMS) with `slight` harmonics.
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`36 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.009 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`P/N 3156-C`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`Spec-754`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`58%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.30` in/sec RMS) with `concerning` harmonics.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `480V +/- 2%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`Spec-720`), cleaned grease cavities of `274 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.63` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`23 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`2.5 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.40` in/sec) over `18549` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`4.6 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`Spec-967`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `25697` hours of continuous running (`112 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels intermittent hot to the touch. High load demand from driven equipment (PUMP-101) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: High ambient air temperature (`139`°C inside enclosure) combined with heavy duty cycle (`52%` load) exceeded thermal dissipation capacity.
action_taken: Installed ventilation louver fans in enclosure (`Spec-806`), washed motor frame (`238 ppm` debris cleared), and verified operating temperature stabilized (`106`°C).
parts_used: Enclosure Exhaust Fan Unit, Motor Frame Cleaning Kit

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.38` in/sec RMS, `16%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`thumping`). High load demand from driven equipment (PUMP-101) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Porosity and casting voids (`0.14 inch` void) inside aluminum rotor short-circuit rings that shifted after `10692` thermal cycles (`151`°C).
action_taken: Extracted rotor, machined end rings to true balance plane (`0.009 tolerance`), balanced dynamically (`G1.0`), and verified smooth running (`0.34` in/sec RMS).
parts_used: Precision Dynamic Balancing Weight Set, End Ring Clip Kit

symptom_description: Motor tripped main overload and instantaneous ground fault protection (`42 Amps`). Stator shows `113`°C localized hotspot on IR scan.
root_cause: Age-related thermal brittleness of Class F winding insulation accelerated by frequent motor start/stop cycles over `8732` operating hours.
action_taken: Removed motor from base plate, transported to electrical rebuild facility for complete Class H stator rewind (`Spec-539`) and VPI resin dip (`1.9%` test).
parts_used: Class H Stator Rewind Service, Motor Lead Lug Kit, Terminal Box Gasket

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `28%` (`147` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough (`0.42` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 74%` above rated `192 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`96`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-338`), renewed lead lugs (`152 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.44` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.005 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `14021` hours of continuous running (`80 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels accelerated hot to the touch.
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged (`79%` blocked) with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame after `14 months`.
action_taken: Cleared `41%` blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V +/- 1%` +/- 1%).

symptom_description: Stator phase winding failed during high-load ramp (`66 Amps`). Polarization Index (PI) dropped to `1.0%` with noticeable smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Voltage spikes (`> 480V +/- 1% peak`) from VFD switching transients exceeded insulation dielectric breakdown threshold (`0.19 Mega-ohms` remaining resistance).
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit (`Spec-157`); sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing (`3.0%`).
parts_used: Complete Replacement Induction Motor 50HP, Coupling Key, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.23` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`46 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.013 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-750`), re-laser aligned (`0.010 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.29` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.61` in/sec RMS) with `noticeable` harmonics. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from PUMP-101.
root_cause: Improper drive belt tension (`67 ft-lbs` over-tension) applied radial load exceeding bearing C values, causing premature race spalling.
action_taken: Pulled motor end shield, pressed on new roller bearing set (`Spec-883`), adjusted belt tension to `158 ft-lbs`, and verified temperature stabilized at `100`°C.
parts_used: Heavy Duty Roller Bearing Set, Belt Tensioning Bolts, Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.53` in/sec RMS) with `progressive` harmonics.
root_cause: Improper drive belt tension (`56 ft-lbs` over-tension) applied radial load exceeding bearing C values, causing premature race spalling.
action_taken: Pulled motor end shield, pressed on new roller bearing set (`P/N 4696-C`), adjusted belt tension to `255 in-lbs`, and verified temperature stabilized at `122`°C.
parts_used: Heavy Duty Roller Bearing Set, Belt Tensioning Bolts, Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `98`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `94`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`).
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked (`0.13 inch` thick layer) with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `20%`.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins (`0.15 inch` buildup removed) and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.75` in/sec RMS) with `drastic` harmonics.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `480V +/- 3%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`P/N 1346-A`), cleaned grease cavities of `171 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket
